Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly low fasting glucose, elevated LDL cholesterol, slightly increased hematocrit, and increased platelet mean and distribution width, which may suggest mild dyslipidemia and possible platelet activation. Recommend clinical correlation for cardiovascular risk assessment and monitoring of glucose and hematological parameters. No acute abnormalities detected.
Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud
